name: Shanghai Qiangsheng Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Qiangsheng Holding Co., Ltd. operates taxis in China. The company operates a fleet of approximately 13,000 taxis in Shanghai. It is also involved in the rental of cars; sale of new and used cars; and the provision of car decoration and repair, and vehicle advertising services. In addition, the company engages in tourism activities; and develops commercial properties. The company was founded in 1919 and is based in Shanghai, China.
